notes: 达人雷达的第一个品牌配置。引擎本体品牌无关，换品牌=换这份配置。主题措辞来自影石官方选人文章的逆向工程（vault: AI先锋大赛-影石选人逻辑-逆向工程），未用任何正例标签调参。adventure_bold 主题经 2026-07-07 删除实验证实为白重量（召回六格逐格不变、中位略好），已移除，六主题变五主题；余下五主题权重按原比例重归一化到和=1。各主题 variants 于 2026-07-07 扩容期增补新垂类（冲浪/滑雪/攀岩/潜水/越野跑/皮划艇/滑板/FPV/徒步/滑翔）宽措辞变体，配合池子扩容到多运动户外垂类。

variants: first-person POV onboard action camera footage, helmet cam riding perspective, immersive 360 degree motorcycle video
first-person POV mountain bike trail footage, chest mount cycling perspective, immersive 360 degree riding video
immersive first-person POV action sports footage, helmet or chest mounted camera surfing skiing snowboarding climbing diving trail running perspective
FPV drone freestyle flight footage, immersive first-person view aerial chase, cinematic drone POV over mountains and waves
authentic self-filmed motovlog, personal storytelling, solo creator sharing real daily riding life
authentic self-filmed cycling vlog, personal storytelling, solo creator sharing real daily cycling life
authentic self-filmed outdoor adventure vlog, solo creator sharing real daily life surfing skiing climbing diving hiking, personal raw storytelling
long distance motorcycle travel journey across countries, road trip documentary, overcoming hardship
long distance bicycle touring journey across countries, bikepacking documentary, overcoming hardship
multi-day outdoor expedition journey, thru-hiking ski touring kayak paddling adventure documentary across remote wilderness, overcoming hardship
camera gear mounting review for motorcycle riding, filming technique tutorial for riders
camera gear mounting review for cycling, filming technique tutorial for mountain bikers
action camera and FPV drone mounting review, filming technique tutorial for surfing skiing climbing diving, rig and stabilizer setup for outdoor sports
professional riding skill, motorcycle racing track technique, expert level riding
professional cycling skill, downhill mountain bike racing technique, expert level bike handling
expert level outdoor sports technique, professional surfing skiing climbing freediving skateboarding skill and progression tutorial

sweet_spot.notes: 中腰部甜点，峰值约 8 万粉。这是「早期下注」策略的数学表达，峰值和宽度是运营可调的策略旋钮。

collect.notes: 常驻采集器策略。search_terms 覆盖摩托/骑行的多语言检索词(英/西/日)，从既有池子构建思路延伸。refresh 轮转刷新最旧的 N 个频道，discover 每次跑 M 个搜索词发现新面孔。
search_terms: mountain bike pov helmet cam trail
モトブログ ヘルメットカメラ バイク
自転車 ダウンヒル ヘルメットカム pov

explain.notes: 推荐卡生成。用本地 ollama chat 模型精读候选元数据。qwen3:8b 支持 /no_think 抑制思维链，format:json 强制结构化输出。brand_context 只给品类语境不给品牌名(打分层泄漏防护不受影响，这是产品路径)。
explain.brand_context: 运动影像相机品牌（第一视角与全景运动相机厂商）

cross_platform.notes: 跨平台矩阵检测(零网络)。正则扫池子文本字段，检出 IG/TikTok/Facebook/X/个人网站的链接与 handle。会经营多平台矩阵的创作者商业成熟度更高，是选人信号，进达人档案。run_radar 每日采集后重扫，幂等重写整个 cross_platform.jsonl。纯机械提取无可调数值，此节仅作说明与开关。

comments.notes: 评论采样(有预算与隐私红线)。对当日排序 top_channels 频道，每频道取最近 videos_per_channel 个视频，每视频抓 comments_per_video 条热门评论(comment_sort=top)。隐私红线: 只留文本与点赞数，作者只存 sha256 前 8 位，绝不入库作者名/头像/链接。预算红线: 每天总请求 <= budget_requests_per_day，单频道失败跳过不中断。dedup_days 天内抓过的频道跳过(去重账本 fetched_index.json)。禁止下载视频/音频本体。产出 data/comments/ 保持 gitignore(第三方用户内容不进仓库)，用途=受众质量信号+内容打标语料+将来喂飞书 AI 总结。

dossiers.notes: 达人档案 MD。对当日推荐卡(cards)的每个频道生成一页 data/dossiers/<channel_id>.md，进公开仓库与飞书文档。含基本盘/订阅快照史/近期视频表/评论区概况(只写统计禁引原文)/跨平台矩阵/当日推荐卡，顶部带 YAML frontmatter。幂等重跑覆盖。数量跟随当日推荐卡数(explain.max_cards)，此节仅作说明与开关。

scoreboard.notes: 预测记分板 v0。每周一存 picks，到期(due_days)后用订阅增长对照全池中位增速结算；增速差在 ±verdict_margin_pct 个百分点内算跑平。

bitable.notes: 飞书多维表格出口。敏感凭证(app_id/app_secret/app_token/table_id)一律不进 repo，全在下面这个本机文件里(chmod 600)。字段 schema 与 cards_table.csv 同构，状态列永远不写。

feishu_docs.notes: 飞书文档出口(日报/达人档案/报告写成飞书原生 docx，让飞书成为团队总部)。复用 bitable 同一份凭证文件(app_id/app_secret 取 token)。每个文档首建拿稳定 document_id，之后原地更新，URL 永久不轮换；Max 自动加成每个文件夹的 full_access。幂等映射存下面 map_path 这个 repo 外文件，敏感标识符不进仓库。失败温和降级只记 log。
